ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "nature" TEXT /* Nature of the trade (e.g., Credit, single name, Interest rate swap) */,
  "residual_maturity" TEXT /* Residual maturity of the trade */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the trade */,
  "notional_amount" REAL /* Notional amount of the trade in thousands */,
  "pay_leg" TEXT /* Pay leg of the trade (e.g., Fixed, Floating) */,
  "receive_leg" TEXT /* Receive leg of the trade (e.g., Fixed, Floating) */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the trade in thousands */,
  "reference_entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity or index involved in the trade */,
  "rating_reference_entity" TEXT /* Rating of the reference entity */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position in the trade (e.g., Protection buyer, Protection seller) */,
  "option_position" TEXT /* Option position in the trade */,
  "underlying_price" REAL /* Underlying price of the trade */,
  "strike_price" REAL /* Strike price of the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was executed */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade matures */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trade (e.g., Active, Closed, Pending) */,
  "counterparty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counterparty involved in the trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who executed the trade */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Risk rating assigned to the trade */,
  "last_valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last valuation of the trade */,
  "last_valuation_value" REAL /* Value of the trade as of the last valuation date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trade record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_receive_leg FOREIGN KEY ("receive_leg") REFERENCES legs ("leg_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_option_position FOREIGN KEY ("option_position") REFERENCES option_positions ("option_position_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_pay_leg FOREIGN KEY ("pay_leg") REFERENCES legs ("leg_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_reference_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_entity_id") REFERENCES reference_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_base_currency FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference entity or index */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference entity or index */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the reference entity (e.g., Firm, Index) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference entity or index */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the reference entity is based */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the reference entity */,
  "rating_agency" TEXT /* Rating agency that provided the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reference entity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reference entity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate of the currency relative to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the currency record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the currency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legs" (
  "leg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leg type */,
  "leg_type" TEXT /* Type of the leg (e.g., Fixed, Floating) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leg type */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate associated with the leg (if applicable) */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payments (e.g., Quarterly, Monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the leg record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the leg record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position type */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of the position (e.g., Protection buyer, Protection seller) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the position record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the position record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_positions" (
  "option_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option position type */,
  "option_position_type" TEXT /* Type of the option position (e.g., Call, Put) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the option position type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the option position record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the option position record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, risk manager, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the trade */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
